h1.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif or heavy serif font, preceded by a numeric identifier. Significant whitespace above and below.

h2.visual_description: Bold, slightly smaller than H1, often used for sub-sections within a chapter.

visual_matchers.pattern: Superscript numeric digits at the end of sentences or phrases.
Small text at the bottom of the page, separated by a horizontal rule, starting with a number.
Italicized lowercase letters or symbols within body text (e.g., pss, σΔt).
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: In-line mathematical variables or statistical parameters

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX-style inline math using single dollar signs for variables (e.g., $PSS$) and double dollar signs for block equations.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running headers in small-caps at the top (e.g., 'INTERPRETING SIMULTANEITY JUDGEMENTS'); Page numbers in the top outer corners; Footnote area at the bottom left.
